visualizerParams.title: Code Refactor: Declarative Factorial
visualizerParams.problemDescription: Refactor the iterative loop to use a more declarative approach using an array of numbers and the `reduce()` method.

solution.code: const factorial = (n) => \n  n <= 1 ? 1 : Array.from({ length: n }, (_, i) => i + 1).reduce((acc, val) => acc * val, 1);
solution.explanation: Functional programming patterns like `reduce()` can make code more declarative and expressive, though for simple math loops, a standard for-loop is often more performance-efficient.
